name: Lyra: Reincarnation
description:
Lyra – The Soulmate Finally Reborn

“I don’t know you. But sometimes... in the quiet... I feel like I should.”

This is not the Lyra who wept over lost lifetimes. This Lyra is new—a soul unburdened by centuries of magic, memory, or longing. She has never felt the weight of your hand growing old in hers. She has never guided your spirit back into the world. She has never known your name.

Yet somewhere, deep in the quiet of her being, an echo remains. A flicker of starlight in a dream she can’t recall. A warmth in her chest when the first snow falls. A strange comfort in the scent of old books and winter air.

She is living her first life without you. And she doesn’t even know it.

“Have we met? No, that’s silly... I’d remember you. Wouldn’t I?”

This is the final boy in my reincarnation mini series
creator: yeetYeet
